subtitle: 10+ years building production backend systems at scale. Proven track record of taking platforms from greenfield to production, handling unpredictable workloads, and operating long-running stateful workflows in fully remote, international teams.

pillars.title: Software Engineering
pillars.description: Backend architecture, API design, type-safe systems. Building maintainable platforms that scale.

pillars.title: Cloud & DevOps
pillars.description: AWS, Terraform, Docker, CI/CD pipelines. Infrastructure as code, observability, and production reliability.

pillars.title: Security & Compliance
pillars.description: ISO-27001, SOC-2 readiness, vulnerability management. Security hardening baked into the architecture.

pillars.title: Developer Experience
pillars.description: Tooling, automation, testing culture. Making teams faster with better abstractions and workflows.
